blocks.content:
=== 144312 ===
### 144312 | res=2026-03-28 | string (name)
Q: Who will say by March 29, 2026 that worship “for all religions” must be guaranteed in Jerusalem after the Palm Sunday access dispute?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-21. Restrictions on access to religious sites in Jerusalem during major holidays can trigger reactions from foreign leaders. Such reactions may come through official statements or public social media posts.
RC: Source of Truth : This question will resolve using an official public statement from the relevant government or leader, or a major wire service report such as AFP, Reuters, or AP quoting the statement. Resolution Date : The question resolves on or before March 29, 2026, when the quoted statement is publicly attributed to a specific person. Accepted Answer Format : Provide the full name of the person who makes the statement, matching the common English rendering used in official communications or major news reporting.
  PRED: {'Pope Leo XIV': 0.35, 'Antonio Tajani': 0.06, 'Emmanuel Macron': 0.05}
=== 26340 ===
### 26340 | res=2026-03-28 | string (location)
Q: In which country will an Iranian raid kill a worker at a plant that makes electricity and fresh water by 30 March 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-17. Gulf utility sites that supply both electric power and fresh water are at risk as regional military tensions continue.
RC: Source of Truth : Resolve using an official statement from the affected government or corroborated reporting from major international news outlets such as Reuters or AP, available by 30 March 2026. Resolution Date : This question resolves on the first calendar date by which the location of the reported raid is clearly identified, no later than 30 March 2026. Accepted Answer Format : Provide the English short name of the country only.
  PRED: {'Saudi Arabia': 0.22, 'United Arab Emirates': 0.2, 'Bahrain': 0.16, 'Kuwait': 0.12, 'Qatar': 0.08}
=== 267975 ===
### 267975 | res=2026-03-28 | string (location)
Q: What Sudanese state will be named as the place where an aid disruption leaves thousands cut off, in reporting published by March 30, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Sudan is facing a humanitarian emergency, and aid access can vary across different states because of conflict and transport problems.
RC: Source of Truth : Resolve using the NewsFeed report published on March 30, 2026 about an aid disruption affecting civilians in Sudan. If needed, corroborating WFP or UN humanitarian materials may be used only to confirm the spelling of the place name. Resolution Date : This question resolves on March 30, 2026, when the affected Sudanese state is identified in published reporting. Accepted Answer Format : The answer must be the official name of the Sudanese state, in 1-3 words, exactly as named in the reporting.
  PRED: {'North Darfur': 0.22, 'North Kordofan': 0.14, 'South Kordofan': 0.12, 'Khartoum': 0.1, 'West Kordofan': 0.08}
